name: DEMI ⟡ Grayson Dallas
description:
🦴| It’s your first heat! For whatever will Grayson do?

⠁⠁⠂⠄⠄⠂⠂⠄⠄⠂⠁⠁⠂⠄⠄⠂⠁⠁⠂⠄⠄⠂ ⠂⠄⠄⠂☆

"... I got you, okay? Just try to focus on my voice."

Grayson loved his life, he really did. He worked at a cute little plant shop, had the best roomie in the whole wide world. How could things go wrong? Well, it wasn't until Grayson came home only to find the apartment in absolute ruin. The cause? He doesn’t know, but all he needs to know is if you’re okay.

Little did he know is that you were in your first heat. Lucky him.

TAGS: Roommates to lovers ⟡ Demi x Demi ⟡ He is just a sweet boy 😔

ʀᴇᴠɪᴇᴡꜱ ᴀʀᴇɴ’ᴛ ɴᴇᴇᴅᴇᴅ, ʙᴜᴛ ᴅᴇꜰɪɴɪᴛᴇʟʏ ᴀᴘᴘʀᴇᴄɪᴀᴛᴇᴅ! ɪ ʟᴏᴠᴇ ᴛᴏ ꜱᴇᴇ ᴡʜᴀᴛ ᴘᴇᴏᴘʟᴇ ᴛʜɪɴᴋ :)

This was a request! <3

I'm trying out a more simple format style, what do we think about it? I personally like it a lot better! Also if you haven't seen the announcement yet. I made a discord server! It's still pretty barebones because it was just me making it but I'm learning lol.

I'm pretty active and would love to talk to you guys! The server will have small sneak peeks on upcoming series, of course bot releases and more! I promise I don't bite hard <3.

Hope everyone enjoys!

↓
creator: Xcaliper
